reviews.comment:
La atencion en el servicompras muy buena, exelentes precios comparado con otros lugares. En cambio en los surtidores los empleados son poco amables.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the convenience store was very good, and the prices were excellent compared to other places. However, the employees at the gas pumps were not very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRek9QanlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención es buena, la infraestructura es muy anticuada, el local es pequeño, no tienen enchufes para las laptops, la television es 20 pulgadas...

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, the infrastructure is very outdated, the place is small, they don't have outlets for laptops, the television is 20 inches...

reviews.comment:
Pequeña estación de servicio en la entrada de Santa Clara. Tiene un pequeño shop surtido. La atención es muy amable.

(Translated by Google)
Small gas station at the entrance to Santa Clara. It has a small, well-stocked shop. The service is very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBMW9TVXpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los playeros son unos capo!!!
Hasta te convidan mate!!!
No es cono otras ACA que, no te dejan entrar a la plya hasta que los playeros lo autorizan. Sino no te despachan...
Me pasó en Dolores y Mar del Plata Colón... Forros!!!

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are awesome!!!
They even offer you mate!!!
It's not like other places in the area where they don't let you onto the beach until the beach attendants authorize it. Otherwise, they won't let you in...
It happened to me in Dolores and Mar del Plata Colón... Assholes!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBXzgyazJBRRAB
